1858460.name: Cursed Spire
1858460.description:
StoryFlow Engine is a simple yet powerful tool designed to help you create visual novels and text-based games with ease. Whether you’re a beginner taking your first steps into game development or an experienced creator looking for a streamlined workflow, StoryFlow Engine provides everything you need to bring your stories to life.

With its visual scripting system, you can design branching stories, dialogues, and interactive events without writing a single line of code. The intuitive interface allows you to focus on storytelling, while built-in tools simplify managing your characters, assets, and music. Once your story is complete, export it as a standalone HTML game that works across devices and share it with your audience effortlessly.

Key Features

  • Beginner-Friendly Visual Scripting
    No coding required! Use an intuitive drag-and-drop node editor to build dialogues, choices, and story logic step by step.

  • Powerful for Advanced Creators
    Create complex branching paths, manage variables, and build interactive experiences that adapt to player decisions.

  • Easy Export
    Export your project as a standalone HTML game, ready to share or publish on platforms like Itch.io or your own website.

  • Character and Scene Management
    Add characters, define expressions, and manage backgrounds with a visual editor to preview your scenes in real time.

  • Asset Library
    Import and organize your images, music, and sound effects with ease.

  • Git-Friendly Collaboration
    Work with your team using Git for version control. Save your projects in a Git-friendly format for seamless collaboration.

  • Cross-Platform Compatibility
    Your exported games will run on Windows, Mac, Linux, and any modern web browser.

Whether you want to craft an epic branching narrative, a heartwarming romance, or an intense mystery, StoryFlow Engine is the perfect tool to make your ideas a reality.

Unleash your creativity and start building your visual novel today!

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
